Functionality is equivalent (true singleton preserved), but the literal criterion text is now stale.
gaps.fix_direction: No code fix needed — singleton behavior is correct. Optionally update TASK-002 criterion text to match new form, or accept as equivalent. Documented here for traceability.

gaps.description: TASK-004 [UI-observable] convergence criterion (manual dev-app streaming render verification) NOT RUN — executor cannot launch Electron dev app. ISS-20260630-002 marked resolved based on typecheck + unit tests, but streaming render behavior (tool-call streaming, link click → file viewer pane, visual parity) requires human verification in dev app before final sign-off.
gaps.fix_direction: Run `bun run dev` in apps/desktop, send a streaming assistant message with tool calls, click a file link — verify no regression vs pre-refactor. If regression found, reopen ISS-20260630-002.
